long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngas05.sr03.tok04 et-1/0/7 <-> ngsc013.1.sr03.tok04 Et14/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19772
